positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a floating cosmic whale swimming through a nebula of iridescent geometric shapes and glowing plankton. The style is a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern geometric abstractism, using deep indigo, sapphire blue, shimmering gold, and ethereal lavender. The whale should have a graceful, clean silhouette, embodying a sense of serene mystery. The composition must be perfectly centered, utilizing negative space around the subject to maintain focus and versatility for apparel printing. Crisp vector lines, high contrast, deep saturation, cinematic cosmic lighting, suitable for screen printing.
